required_content: pion/kaon/eta or other declared hadronic observables used to calibrate light quark masses
why_required: fixes low-energy physical scale; may not be chosen from APF residuals

required_content: a plus scale-setting observable and continuum extrapolation protocol
why_required: sets dimensionful conversion from lattice units

required_content: fermion/gauge action, sea-quark content, volumes, lattice spacings, quark masses
SU(2)/SU(3) chiral perturbation or equivalent extrapolation/interpolation form
why_required: separates current quark masses from hadronic bound-state data

required_content: QED correction convention and m_u != m_d isospin-breaking prescription
Z_m or equivalent mass renormalization factor
why_required: maps lattice/bare masses into renormalized scheme

required_content: conversion to MSbar at mu=2 GeV, loop/order convention, alpha_s, thresholds
statistical, chiral, continuum, finite-volume, matching, EM/isospin covariance among u,d,s
none of the above may be solved from target u,d,s masses or APF residuals
